args.sql:
SELECT row_number() OVER () as rn, id FROM (
  SELECT kgr.kode as id, kgr.omrade
  FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade kgr
  WHERE ST_Intersects(kgr.omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='5001' LIMIT 1))
  UNION ALL
  SELECT u.omrade::text as id, u.omrade
  FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr u
  WHERE ST_Intersects(u.omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='5001' LIMIT 1))
) as sub LIMIT 100;
